message:
perf(sync,channel): replace Vec with SmallVec for hot-path waker collections

Eliminates per-call heap allocations in waker collection paths by using
stack-local SmallVec buffers. smallvec v1.13 was already a dependency
but unused in src/; these are the first production uses.

notify.rs: Vec<Waker> → SmallVec<[Waker; 8]> in notify_waiters()
rwlock.rs: Vec<Waker> → SmallVec<[Waker; 4]> in drain_reader_waiters()
           and 4 call sites (release_writer, WriteFuture/OwnedWriteFuture drop)
once_cell.rs: Vec<(Waker, Arc<AtomicBool>)> → SmallVec<[...; 4]> in wake_all()
watch.rs: Mutex<Vec<WatchWaiter>> → Mutex<SmallVec<[WatchWaiter; 4]>>
          field type + constructor + wake_all_waiters()

Capacity choices match typical contention: most notifications wake 1-4
tasks, RwLock reader queues are shallow under writer-preference fairness,
OnceCell typically has 1-3 racing initializers, watch channels have few
concurrent receivers waiting.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
